solutions.pageSectionsDescription: Jump to the part of the solution page that is most relevant to your current evaluation, whether you are reviewing process fit, expected outcomes, or related technical resources.
solutions.includedContentDescription: This page already connects the core products, practical guides, and related insights most relevant to this scenario, so your team can review the working package more quickly.

cookie.title: Cookie preferences
cookie.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide essential site functionality, analyse traffic and improve your experience. You can manage your preferences by category below.
cookie.whatAre: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our site. They help us remember your settings, keep you signed in, and understand how the site is used.
cookie.necessaryDesc: These cookies are essential for the website to work and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions you take, such as setting privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms.
cookie.analyticsDesc: We use these to understand how visitors use our site (e.g. page views, time on site) so we can improve it. Data is typically collected in an anonymous way.
cookie.functionalDesc: These remember your preferences (e.g. language, region) to give you a more personalised experience.
cookie.marketingDesc: These may be used to remember pages you visited, show relevant ads, or measure the effectiveness of our communications. You can decline them without affecting core site features.
cookie.saved: Your cookie preferences have been saved.

form.name: Name
form.submitSuccess: Submitted successfully. We will get back to you soon.
form.submitConfigError: Submission is not configured. Please try again later.
form.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please try again later.

privacyPolicy.intro: Gloris ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect information you provide through this website or that we obtain automatically. By using this site you agree to this policy.
privacyPolicy.s1Body: This website is operated by Gloris to present our products, insights and business partnership information. When you submit information via forms such as "Become Our Dealer" or "Contact Us", we process your personal data in accordance with this policy.
privacyPolicy.s2Body: We may collect: data you provide (e.g. name, email, phone, country/region, message); device and usage data (e.g. IP, browser type, pages and time of visit); and data from cookies and similar technologies. We only collect analytics, functional or marketing cookies where you have consented or where the law allows.
privacyPolicy.s3Body: We use the data to: respond to your enquiries and dealer applications, improve the website and your experience, analyse usage (where you have agreed), comply with legal obligations, and other purposes with your consent. We do not use your data for marketing unrelated to these purposes unless you have agreed.
privacyPolicy.s4Body: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide essential functionality, remember your preferences, and—where you consent—for analytics or marketing. You can manage or turn off non-essential cookies by category at any time on our Cookie preferences page. See that page for details.
privacyPolicy.s5Body: We may share data with third parties that provide technical or operational services for this site (e.g. hosting, form handling, analytics). They may only process data on our instructions. We do not sell your personal data. We may disclose data where required by law or to protect rights and safety.
privacyPolicy.s6Body: We keep your data only for as long as needed for the purposes for which it was collected. For example, enquiry and dealer application data is typically kept for a reasonable period after the business communication ends, or longer if required by law.
privacyPolicy.s7Body: Under applicable law you may have the right to access, correct, delete or restrict your personal data we hold, or to object to certain processing or withdraw consent. You may also complain to a supervisory authority. These rights may apply if you are in the EEA or similar regions. Please use the contact details below to make a request.
privacyPolicy.s8Body: If you have questions or requests about this policy or your personal data, please contact us via the "Contact Us" page or the email/phone shown on the Cookie preferences page. We will respond as soon as practicable.
privacyPolicy.s9Body: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date on this page will be revised when we do. We encourage you to review it periodically. Continued use of the site after changes means you accept the updated policy.
